title: Star Wars: Republic: The New Face of War

'''''Star Wars: Republic: The New Face of War''''' was the thirteenth story arc in ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]''.

==Plot summary==
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], as well as Master [[Glaive (Jedi)|Glaive]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Zule Xiss]] and the ARC trooper [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha-17]] were sent to the moon of [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]], over [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], as they were led to believe Spices Miners had just attacked a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] colony. But when they arrive near the colony, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] discover that the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] have used the Gungans as an test, with a lethal new gas produced by [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]<ref>In author [[James Luceno]]'s 2005 novel ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'', Jenna Zan Arbor was identified as the crazed Separatist [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who created the lethal [[swamp gas]] used on the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] on [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]] at the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Zan Arbor's character was originally created by author [[Jude Watson]] in her [[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice|''Jedi Apprentice'']] and [[Star Wars: Jedi Quest (novel series)|''Jedi Quest'']] series published by [[Scholastic]].</ref> on [[Queyta]]. The Separatists plan on crashing a ship filled with the gas onto the moon, to frame the miners for the atrocity. When the Jedi and clone arrive, they find a contingent of droids. They destroy all the droids, but when they assist the miners, two unknown characters arrive: the [[Gen'Dai/Legends|Gen'Dai]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]], who wants to kill all the clones because they are offsprings of a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] (and he just hates Mandalorians), and the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] apprentice [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]. Ventress kills Glaive while Anakin and Alpha are helping the miners, but in the end Obi-Wan and Zule defeat the two enemies, who flee from the moon, and Anakin and Alpha destroy the ship the Separatists want to crash on the planet. Anakin did not want to believe that the Confederation would do so, but Obi-Wan says: "Believe it, Anakin, this is the new face of war ..."
